title: Dubai reopens Shri Krishna Temple and St Mary’s Church from April 11 with limited services
summary_full: Dubai's Shri Krishna Temple and St Mary's Catholic Church reopened on April 11, 2026, after precautionary closures due to heightened regional tensions. These reopenings signal a gradual return to normal religious activities, with both institutions implementing safety measures and controlled access for worshippers.
